title: castilleja purpurea
intro: Castilleja purpurea, also known as Indian paintbrush or prairie fire, is a flowering plant native to North America, characterized by its bright red and yellow flowers resembling a paintbrush. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Castilleja purpurea include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, and its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Castilleja purpurea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is also used in salves and ointments for topical application.
